g.text: 关键 Java 依赖 (pom.xml 直接依赖，已砍 transitives)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 373px; height: 1px; padding-top: 58px; margin-left: 157px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
运行时框架
Spring Boot 3.3.6 (Web · Data JPA · Actuator)
Spring AI 1.1.2 (模型抽象 · OpenAI · DeepSeek · Ollama)
Spring AI Alibaba Core (DashScope 集成)
Spring AI Alibaba Graph Core (工作流运行时)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 373px; height: 1px; padding-top: 193px; margin-left: 157px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
数据访问
MyBatis Plus 3.5.9 (ORM)
Druid 1.2.20 (连接池)
Redisson 3.27 (Redis 分布式客户端)
Elasticsearch Client 8.13 (vector store · full-text search)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.div:
消息 & 协议
RocketMQ Client 5.0 (异步消息)
Nacos Client 3.0.3 (注册 & 配置)
MCP SDK 0.9.0 (模型上下文协议)

Guava · Lombok · Swagger · JGraphT · ASM · OGNL
Commons Collections · Jackson · Reactor · Fastjson · Nashorn · jaxb-api
